description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Eternity Build that can be triggered manually. The workflow should have two jobs, one for building on Windows and one for building on macOS. On Windows, check out the code with submodules, configure CMake for 64-bit and 32-bit builds, build the project, add text files, and upload the release build as an artifact. On macOS, check out the code with submodules, configure CMake for ARM and Intel builds, build the project, add text files, create DMG files, and upload the release build as an artifact.
